issues.title: Recording is over three minutes
issues.action: Trim the recording to three minutes or less.

issues.title: Face is too small for detailed analysis
issues.action: Move closer so your face is at least 200×200 pixels.

issues.title: Upper body is not consistently visible
issues.message: Shoulders and hips are not visible often enough for body metrics.
issues.action: Frame your shoulders, torso and hands throughout the recording.

issues.title: Multiple people detected
issues.message: Up to 2 faces appear in sampled frames.
issues.action: Confirm the selected central, persistent speaker or re-record alone.

issues.title: Audio may clip
issues.action: Lower microphone gain and leave headroom.

limitations: Spatial-use estimates assume a stationary camera.
Smile AU6/AU12 values are geometric proxies, not trained FACS detections.
